_comment: Alice (born 1955, already 71 in 2026) moves to Australia in 2026 with a $2M brokerage growing at 9%/year. Low SS ($1,500/month) and high expenses ($80K/year) mean brokerage fills a ~$60K annual gap. The 9% growth on the large balance outpaces withdrawals, so by the mid-2030s the balance is well above brokMVB and substantial AU CGT accrues. This isolates whether SS is incorrectly included in the AU CGT bracket base.
